blocks.content: That was when they heard it.
Not from outside. From below. A door opened hard — and then voices. Two of them.
Kit was in the hallway in two steps. Daisy right behind him. Eli's face appeared in the bathroom doorway, eyes wide. Savannah already at his shoulder.
Kit put one finger to his lips. None of them were breathing anyway.

blocks.speaker: Voice
blocks.content: Said the back door was unlocked—

blocks.speaker: Voice
blocks.content: I'm telling you nobody's here, would you just—
A crash. Something knocked from a surface. A laugh that didn't connect to anything funny.
The voices got clearer. Men. Rough, loose at the edges.
Kit looked at the window at the end of the hall. The staircase. One exit. Two men below it.
